description: Ordinary fields include punctuation, casing, and spacing variations that should still compare as matches after normalization.

covers.frontend_upload: Verify the upload flow accepts a PNG image fixture with ordinary field formatting differences.
covers.backend_ingest_and_preprocess: Verify the backend accepts the image and forwards it through the OCR path for extraction.
covers.ocr_extraction: Assert OCR recovers the variant field text, especially the ABV, net contents, and producer line.
covers.processing_and_validation: Assert tolerant normalization produces matches for ordinary fields while the warning still matches exactly.

ocr_anchor_text: BOTTLED BY Old Tom Distillery - Frankfort, KY.

expected_extracted_fields.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
